scope.note: Single top-level dir: plugins/sulis/scripts. Single feat WP.

size.note: Two new files: a 192-line CLI + a 280-line integration test. Above the 200-line single-reader threshold but only 2 files, both brand-new and single-purpose.

completeness.note: CLI ships with 7 integration tests covering happy path, why-first gate, idempotence, roadmap sidecar, brain-unavailable, envelope shape, and missing-contract degradation.
